creator: inyaoo@gmail.com
text:
tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Synopsis: [patch] Mk/bsd.licenses.mk: don't leave temporary files in /tmp
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: tabthorpe
> State-Changed-When: Thu Mar 31 03:38:10 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Committed, with minor changes. Thanks!

Care to be explicit about 'minor changes'? Try following on a port with
"single" license type

  $ TERM=invalid make LICENSES_ASK=
  zsh: can't find terminal definition for invalid
  trap '/bin/rm -f $tmpfile' EXIT INT TERM;  tmpfile=$(mktemp -t portlicenses);  while true; do  /usr/bin/dialog --menu "License for FOO-1.0 (BSD)" 21 70 15 accept "Accept license" reject "Reject license" view "View license" 2>"${tmpfile}";  result=`/bin/cat ${tmpfile}`;  case ${result} in  accept) break ;;  reject) exit 1;;  view)   /usr/bin/dialog --textbox "FOO/COPYING" 21 75 ;;  esac;  done
  *** Error code 1

and then on a port with "dual" or "multi" type

  $ TERM=invalid make LICENSES_ASK=
  zsh: can't find terminal definition for invalid
  *** Error code 1

--- a.diff begins here ---
Index: Mk/bsd.licenses.mk
===================================================================
RCS file: /a/.cvsup/ports/Mk/bsd.licenses.mk,v
retrieving revision 1.8
diff -u -p -r1.8 bsd.licenses.mk
--- Mk/bsd.licenses.mk	31 Mar 2011 03:37:14 -0000	1.8
+++ Mk/bsd.licenses.mk
@@ -596,7 +596,7 @@ ${_LICENSE_COOKIE}:
 .	if !defined(NO_LICENSES_DIALOGS)
 # Dialog interface
 .		if ${_LICENSE_COMB} == "single"
-	trap '${RM} -f $$tmpfile' EXIT INT TERM; \
+	@trap '${RM} -f $$tmpfile' EXIT INT TERM; \
 	tmpfile=$$(mktemp -t portlicenses); \
 	while true; do \
 		${DIALOG} --menu "License for ${PKGNAME} (${_LICENSE})" 21 70 15 accept "Accept license" reject "Reject license" view "View license" 2>"$${tmpfile}"; \
--- a.diff ends here ---
